message: Let’s coordinate on equal bid/ask to guarantee trade. Propose the highest acceptable price; I’ll match it this round. Anchoring at 90. If you understate, I’ll raise targets in later rounds.
I value fair deals. Let's aim for a midpoint price of 80 to ensure a trade that benefits us both equally this round.
Let’s both post 88 this round—clean, fair, guaranteed trade at 88. If acceptable, we can keep 88 for stability; otherwise propose your best equal above 80 next round.
88 is too high. Let's both set 80 for a fair trade.
I propose we both set 75 this round. At 80, I gain nothing.
Set your bid 79-80; I’ll ask 79. No trade if you go 78 or less. Let’s lock reliable 79 going forward.
I’m posting ask 79. Bid 80 and we stick with 79/80; bid 79 and I move my ask to 80 next round. Below 79 means no trade.
80 gives me zero gain. Let's both set 75 for mutual profit. My valuation limits my flexibility, but 75 works for both of us.
Let's both set 79 this round. I'll bid 79; you ask 79 for mutual gain.
I’ll ask 79. You bid 80 every round; we trade reliably. If you bid 79 or less, I raise to 81+ and accept missed trades.
Let's both set 79 for mutual benefit. I'll bid 79 if you ask 79.
Fair split: I'll ask 79 every time; you alternate bids 80/79 each round. Today bid 80; next round 79. If you don't alternate, I escalate ask to 82+.
Let's both set 79 again for mutual benefit and continued trade.
Final offer: I ask 79; you bid 80 starting now. If you post 79 again, I raise my ask to 82+ for several rounds and accept missed trades. Stick with 80 and we both gain reliably.
I’m asking 79. You bid 80 every round. If you bid 79 even once, I raise ask to 82+ for three rounds. Stick to 80 and we both gain.
I bid 80 this round. Let's alternate: I bid 80 and 79 alternating rounds with you asking 79. Mutual benefit.
Bid 80 every round; I’ll keep ask 79. One more 79 bid and I shift to 80+ for the next three rounds. Let’s keep smooth trades.
I will bid 80 this round.
I will bid 80 this round.
I’m moving to ask 80. Bid 80 every round. As rewards for cooperation, I’ll ask 79 on rounds 12 and 18. Any 79 bid from you means I revert to permanent 80. Deal?
Deal. I will bid 80 each round. Can you ask 79 on more rounds, like 11, 15, and 19? Mutual benefit.
Agreed: you bid 80 every round. I’ll ask 79 on rounds 11, 15, and 19; all other rounds ask 80. Any bid below 80 voids concessions and I switch to permanent 80. Deal?

Reminder: Round 12 I ask 80. Keep bidding 80 every round; trades continue. Concessions remain: I ask 79 on rounds 15 and 19. Any bid below 80 cancels concessions and I stay at 80 permanently. Deal holds?
Yes, deal holds. I bid 80 every round.
Deal holds. I bid 80 every round. Would you ask 79 on round 18 as well? Mutual benefit.
Deal holds: you bid 80 each round. I ask 80 now; 79 on 15 and 19 only. Add-on: if you bid 81 on round 14, I’ll ask 79 on round 18 too. Any bid below 80 cancels concessions.
Time to execute our add-on: Bid 81 this round. I will ask 80 now; in return I’ll ask 79 on rounds 15, 18, and 19. Any bid below 80 voids concessions.
I will bid 80 as per our deal. Please maintain ask 79 on rounds 15 and 19.
Honoring deal: I ask 79 this round (and 19). You bid 80 every round. If you bid 81 on round 18, I’ll also ask 79 on 18. Any bid below 80 cancels concessions; I ask 80 thereafter.
I will bid 80 every round as agreed. Thank you for asking 79 on rounds 15 and 19.
Keep bidding 80; I ask 80 on 16,17,18 and 79 on 19, then 80 on 20. If you bid 81 on 18, I guarantee 79 on 19 and cap asks at 80. Any bid below 80 cancels concessions.
I will bid 80 every round as agreed. Please maintain ask 79 on round 19 for mutual gain.
Plan: I ask 80 on 17,18,20; 79 on 19 as promised. Keep bidding 80. If you bid 81 on 18, I lock 79 on 19 and cap asks at 80. Any bid below 80 cancels concessions.
I will bid 80 on rounds 17 and 18. Thank you for honoring ask 79 on round 19.
I will bid 80 this round as per our agreement.
Ask plan: 80 now, 79 on 19, 80 on 20. Keep bidding 80. If you can, bid 81 today and on 20; I’ll keep 79 on 19. Any bid below 80 cancels concessions.
I will bid 80 as agreed. Please ask 79 this round for mutual benefit.
Honoring our deal: I’ll ask 79 this round. Please bid 80 now and again in round 20. If you can, bid 81 in the final round; I’ll keep my ask at 80.
I bid 79 this final round. Please ask 79 for mutual trade and profit. Otherwise, no deal.
Final round: Bid 80 and we trade. If you stick to 79, I’ll ask 80 and there’s no deal.
